title: Robots Toy for 6 7 8 9 10 11 12+ Year Old Boy, 4 in 1 Technik RC Building Set Gifts for Boys Ages 6-12+ Building Set App & Remote Control Educational Toys
features: 【4-in-1 RC Building Kit】Our robot building block set has 588 building blocks, which can be assembled into 4 different styles of robot toys, and enjoy 4 different building and playing experiences. (Only one model can be created at a time). Give full play to kid's imagination and provide them with hours of fun!

【Exquisite Design】The robot is a combination of building blocks and gears. When it is running, you can see the gears turning, which is full of technological mechanical sense. Flexible joints, rotating head and hands, track wheels, and smooth running on any terrain. Children can learn about mechanics and movement mechanisms during the assembly process, and cultivate their creativity and imagination. Keep children away from the screen.

【Remote and App Control】This robot can be controlled by remote control or APP connection to control the robot kit. The APP can realize multiple remote control modes driving mode, path mode, gravity sensor and programming mode. Simple and easy to use. Provide unparalleled gaming experience!

【Creative Toys】This is a creative toy suitable for kids aged 6-14+, which stimulates their imagination, helps them learn to assemble, create and play, and stimulates their interest in early learning programming concepts. Our building blocks are carefully made of non-toxic high-quality ABS plastic, which is compatible and easy to connect, not easy to fall apart, and also wear-resistant and durable.

【Ideal Gift for Kids】Exquisite packaging, cool robots, and the ingenuity of building blocks and robots make it a dream gift for kids.Suitable as a gift for boys or girls aged 6 -14. Ideal for birthday gifts, Halloween, Christmas, Children's Day and other festivals
